title: Category-Based Tool Classification
description: ToolDef struct with category field (read/write/search/run/plan/web) groups tools by operation type
patchShape: Create JSON schema defining tool categories as enum with per-category operation constraints
rm8Prevention: Partially - category classification enables category-level gating (e.g., auto-deny 'run' category for read-only dispatches)

title: Enabled/Disabled Allowlist Filtering
description: ToolRegistry with explicit enabled/disabled lists and filtering logic
patchShape: Create JSON schema with allowed_tools and denied_tools arrays, plus filter_mode enum
rm8Prevention: Yes - if bash was in denied_tools list for read-only dispatches, tool would be filtered before execution

title: 2-Stage Routing with Category Selector
description: 2-stage routing: model picks category first, then system injects only that category's tool schemas
patchShape: Document 2-stage routing pattern: category descriptions → category selection → category-specific schemas
rm8Prevention: Indirectly - reduces cognitive load and enables category-level gating (disable 'run' category for read-only)

title: Write-Operation Approval Gate with Diff View
description: Approval gate for write operations with diff view (patch shows hunk, write_file shows diff or preview)
patchShape: Create JSON schema defining approval_mode, diff_view_enabled, write_categories, per-tool thresholds
rm8Prevention: No - --dangerously-skip-permissions bypasses approval gates, but 'strict' mode would require confirmation for each bash

title: Structured Permissions Matrix
description: Structured allow/deny lists for file-glob × operation × scope (e.g., Read(<repo-root>/**), Exec(rm) denied)
patchShape: Create JSON schema with allow/deny arrays, default_action, scope_tokens, validation_rules. Runtime enforcer rejects violations.
rm8Prevention: Yes - deny list includes Exec(rm), allow list restricts Write() to iteration-*.md pattern. Runtime enforcer rejects before execution.
